reddit_post.title: I built Lost potential clients because my Instagram looked "inactive — feedback welcome
reddit_post.body:
Hey everyone,

I noticed a lot of people talking about this problem: Lost potential clients because my Instagram looked "inactive." Now I'm spending entire Sundays filming reels.

So I built a solution. It's an MVP right now but it works.

Would love your feedback. What features would make this a must-have?
